known_issues.gage_canvas_push: PENDING REBUILD — gage_read_code review lands in chat correctly but code does not push to canvas. Root cause: Gage needs direct canvas reference, not string-based tag passing. Fence intercept fires but Gage's own inline suggestion snippets interfere. Recommend architectural fix: pass canvas reference into gage_bridge at init time.
known_issues.gage_launch: PENDING — gage_ai.py requires heavy deps (whisper, pygame, trimesh, transformers, torch). Needs dedicated venv.
known_issues.duplicate_reload_in_registry: module_registry.py has two def reload() — second overwrites first. Harmless but should be cleaned up.
known_issues.module_store_install_bar_positioning: Install bar uses pack_forget/pack but positioning may be inconsistent depending on canvas mode. Test before relying on it.

architecture_notes.sovereign_loop: V + Ethica can now co-create tools inside Ethica: name → boilerplate on canvas → edit → hot-load → live. No restart needed.
architecture_notes.register_module: module_registry.register_module(path) — copies folder to modules/, hot-loads, returns status string
architecture_notes.comment_strip: response_no_comments now preserves ``` fence content — splits on fence boundaries before stripping # lines
architecture_notes.scanner_output: TrinityScanner saves to ~/Ethica/scans/ — NOT inside module dir. Correct location.
architecture_notes.gage_routing: gage read + gage review both route to gage_read_code via MODULE_TRIGGERS. _is_gage_cmd guard prevents WormBot intercepting the filepath.
architecture_notes.wormbot_ext_order: file_pattern regex: py|json|js — json MUST come before js
